zh.Thornton, Leicestershire County, England: 英國萊希斯特斯爾桑頓
zh.Malden, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可馬爾頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Darcy於大約1417年出生在英國艾可馬爾頓時，他的父親Robert Darcy27歲，母親Lady Alice Fitzlangley24歲。他於1456年2月17日之前與Elizabeth Tyrrell在英國艾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1458年在英國艾可被列為high sheriff。他去世於1469年11月2日在他的家鄉享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可馬爾頓。

zh-hans.Thornton, Leicestershire County, England: 英国萊希斯特斯爾桑頓
zh-hans.Malden, Essex, England: 英国英格兰艾可馬爾頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Darcy于大约1417年出生在英国艾可馬爾頓时，他的父亲Robert Darcy27岁，母亲Lady Alice Fitzlangley24岁。他于1456年2月17日之前与Elizabeth Tyrrell在英国艾可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1458年在英国艾可被列为high sheriff。他去世于1469年11月2日在他的家乡享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可馬爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Darcy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Brendan, Eamonn, Maeve, Malachy, Niamh, Seamus.  French Gisele, Julien, Normand, Alain, Armand, Cecile, Clemence, Dominique, Emile, Gilles, Jean-Paul, Laure.
English (Lancashire) and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Arcy in Manche, France, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’.

Irish: in Ireland, this is generally the Norman name (see 1 above), established in Meath by Sir William D'Arcy in the 1360s, but it was also adopted for Ó Dorchaidhe ‘descendant of the dark one’, from dorcha ‘dark, gloomy’, a Connacht name that fell together with the Norman surname, which was introduced by Sir William D'Arcy and Sir John D'Arcy, Chief Justiciar of Ireland in the 14th century.

variants.name: Darcey
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and Irish (Tipperary): variant of   Darcy  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Darcy was born about 1417, in Maldon, Essex, England, his father, Robert Darcy, was 27 and his mother, Lady Alice Fitzlangley, was 24. He married Elizabeth Tyrrell before 17 February 1456, in Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. In 1458, at the age of 42, his occupation is listed as high sheriff in Essex, England. He died on 2 November 1469, in his hometown, at the age of 53, and was buried in Maldon, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Darcy est né environ 1417, à Maldon, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Robert Darcy, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Fitzlangley, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Tyrrell avant 17 février 1456, à Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. En 1458, à l’âge de 42 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff à Essex, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 2 novembre 1469, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Maldon, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Darcy um 1417 in Maldon, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Darcy 27 und seine Mutter Lady Alice Fitzlangley 24. Er hat vor 17. Februar 1456 in Essex, England Elizabeth Tyrrell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1458, als er 42 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als high sheriff in Essex, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 2. November 1469 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Maldon, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Darcy è nato il circa 1417 nel Maldon, Essex, England, il suo padre, Robert Darcy, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Lady Alice Fitzlangley, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Tyrrell prima del 17 febbraio 1456, nel Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1458, all'età di 42 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff nel Essex, England. Morì il 2 novembre 1469, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Maldon, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Thornton, Leicestershire County, England: イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアソルントン
ja.Malden, Essex, England: イギリスイギリスエセックスマルドン
ja.Danbury, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスダンブリー
ja.Maldon, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスマルドン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Darcyが約1417年にイギリスエセックスマルドンで生まれた時，父Robert Darcyは27歳，母Lady Alice Fitzlangleyは24歳であった。1456年2月17日以前にイギリスエセックスでElizabeth Tyrrellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1458年，42歳の時，イギリスエセックスでの職業はhigh sheriffと記録されている。彼は1469年11月2日に故郷で53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスマルドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Darcy(이)가 대략 1417년 영국 에세스 맬던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Darcy(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice Fitzlangley(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1456년 2월 17일 이전 영국 에세스에서 Elizabeth Tyrrell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1458년, 42세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 에세스에서 high sheriff이었다. 그는 1469년 11월 2일 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 맬던에 묻혔다.

mn.Malden, Essex, England: Maldon, Ēastseaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Darcy nasceu aproximadamente 1417, em Maldon, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Darcy, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Fitzlangley, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Tyrrell antes 17 de fevereiro de 1456, em Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1458, com 42 anos, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff em Essex, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 2 de novembro de 1469, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Maldon, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Darcy родился около 1417 г. в местности малдон, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Darcy было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Fitzlangley, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Tyrrell перед 17 февраль 1456 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. В 1458 году, в возрасте 42 лет,  он работал по профессии high sheriff в местности эссекс, Англия. Он умер 2 ноября 1469 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности малдон, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Darcy nació aproximadamente 1417, en Maldon, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Darcy, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Lady Alice Fitzlangley, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Tyrrell antes de 17 de febrero de 1456, en Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1458, a la edad de 42 años, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff en Essex, Inglaterra. Murió el 2 de noviembre de 1469, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Maldon, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
